label_notes: Source: training knowledge (live fetch blocked). Robinhood is a heavily regulated financial services company with strong SEC oversight. Collects comprehensive financial data including SSN and government ID. Both encryption at rest and independent audits (SEC) are disclosed. Does not sell data for marketing. Notable data types: trading history, investment portfolio details, cryptocurrency addresses. Regulatory constraints limit deletion options. Gap: no mention of how AI/ML training is handled with sensitive investment data.
